name: operator added entries are preserved across simulated plugin update by the sync mechanism
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: []
operator_namespace:
  - {id: keep-me, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 2, applies_to: [node]}
' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/regenerate-defaults.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'keep-me' .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
